mentions.note: Company imploded despite good story repeatedly told on show; Cramer owns in trust; needs further investigation.

Down from $233 to $204 despite high growth and transitioning from pure middleman to services manager model. Trades <20x earnings, filling management gap for large independent medical orgs. Cramer buying for charitable trust early; sees steal.
Fell hard unjustly. Fundamentals solid and improving. Buy aggressively; Cramer bought more today for trust.
Classic drug distribution play praised to the moon; delivered strong quarter; almost never down but buyable on any weakness.
Up 60% last year; recent urology acquisition impressive. Cramer targets $300; sees upside from healthcare consolidation.

Transformed into healthcare backbone not middleman; specialty $50B+ (16% CAG); margins expanded; at-home solutions moat (diabetes, urology, ostomy); FY26 EPS $10+; raised guidance; 74% gain in 2025, surging again.
